title: Yushania basihirsuta

Within the Poaceae family, Yushania basihirsuta is classified as a member of the subfamily Bambusoideae and the tribe Bambuseae. The genus Yushania is also part of the subfamily Bambusoideae, and it is closely related to other bamboo genera such as Chusquea and Fargesia. The plant has been found to possess several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer.
